name: Apple-Bacon Quiches
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Thinly sliced red Delicious apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sifted flour and 1 teaspoon salt in a bowl.
2. Cut in shortening until particles are about the size of peas.
3. Sprinkle with approximately 5 tablespoons cold milk, adding just enough to make stiff dough.
4. Shape into 6 balls.
5. Roll out on a lightly floured board to 6-inch circles and fit into 6 (5-inch) tart pans.
6. Fold edges under and build up high fluted rim.
7. Pierce all over with fork tines.
8. Separate 1 egg. Beat the egg white lightly and brush over the bottoms and sides of shells.
9. Bake at a lower temperature in the center of the oven at 425°F for 15 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, melt butter and sauté bacon for 1 minute.
11. Add apple slices, cover, and cook about 10 minutes until apples are almost translucent.
12. Beat the remaining whole eggs with the remaining egg yolk.
13. Add flour, half and half, remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt, nutmeg, caraway seeds, and dry mustard; mix well.
14. Sprinkle cheese evenly among tart shells, top with apples and bacon.
15. Pour egg mixture into shells.
16. Bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes, or until set in the center. Cool to lukewarm before cutting.
